title: National Food Shortage Warning
description: Crop failures abroad threaten national food imports.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Stockpiling stabilizes supply. Global shortages can cascade quickly.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Stockpiling distorts markets. Let prices adjust so farmers respond naturally.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Natural responses take too long. Hunger causes unrest.

turns.speaker: economy
turns.text: Subsidizing agriculture boosts production without panic buying.

turns.speaker: rights
turns.text: Subsidies pick winners and losers. Freedom drives innovation.

turns.speaker: security
turns.text: Freedom doesn’t fill empty shelves. Security requires preparation.
